SOURCE.DESCRIPTION: W_STATUS_D dimension table is used for tracking attributes associated with statuses of purchase orders, requisitions, shipments, inventory, customer cases, contact statuses and other documents. There could be several classes of statuses such as order status, requisition status, schedule status, document status, case status, call status and so on. Depending on the class of transactions, the table could have different category of values. The status class is identified by the column W_STATUS_CLASS. This table is designed to be a Type-1 dimension.
SOURCE.NAME: W_STATUS_D

SOURCEFIELD.DESCRIPTION: Surrogate key to uniquely identify a record.
SOURCEFIELD.NAME: ROW_WID

SOURCEFIELD.DESCRIPTION: Identifies the classification of the status. For example, purchase receipt could be represented by PURR.
SOURCEFIELD.NAME: W_STATUS_CLASS

SOURCEFIELD.DESCRIPTION: Identifies the status code as defined in the source system.
SOURCEFIELD.NAME: STATUS_CODE

SOURCEFIELD.DESCRIPTION: Identifies the status name as defined in the source system.
SOURCEFIELD.NAME: STATUS_NAME

SOURCEFIELD.DESCRIPTION: Detailed description of the status code as defined in the source system.
SOURCEFIELD.NAME: STATUS_DESC

SOURCEFIELD.DESCRIPTION: Identifies the sub status code as defined in the source system.
SOURCEFIELD.NAME: SUBSTATUS_CODE

SOURCEFIELD.DESCRIPTION: Identifies the sub status name as defined in the source system.
SOURCEFIELD.NAME: SUBSTATUS_NAME

SOURCEFIELD.DESCRIPTION: Detailed description of the sub status code as defined in the source system.
SOURCEFIELD.NAME: SUBSTATUS_DESC

SOURCEFIELD.DESCRIPTION: Identifies the status code as converted in the datawarehouse. This is a domain value column.
SOURCEFIELD.NAME: W_STATUS_CODE

SOURCEFIELD.DESCRIPTION: Detailed description of the status code as converted in the datawarehouse. This is a domain value column.
SOURCEFIELD.NAME: W_STATUS_DESC

SOURCEFIELD.DESCRIPTION: Identifies the sub status code as converted in the datawarehouse. This is a domain value column.
SOURCEFIELD.NAME: W_SUBSTATUS_CODE

SOURCEFIELD.DESCRIPTION: Detailed description of the sub status code as converted in the datawarehouse. This is a domain value column.
SOURCEFIELD.NAME: W_SUBSTATUS_DESC

SOURCEFIELD.DESCRIPTION: Identifies whether the record is Active/Enabled in the source
SOURCEFIELD.NAME: ACTIVE_FLG

SOURCEFIELD.DESCRIPTION: This is a foreign key to the W_USER_D dimension indicating the user who created the record in the source system.
SOURCEFIELD.NAME: CREATED_BY_WID

SOURCEFIELD.BUSINESSNAME: Source Record Last Modified By User Surrogate Key
SOURCEFIELD.DESCRIPTION: This is a foreign key to the W_USER_D dimension indicating the user who last modified the record in the source system.
SOURCEFIELD.NAME: CHANGED_BY_WID

SOURCEFIELD.BUSINESSNAME: Source Record Creation Date and Time
SOURCEFIELD.DESCRIPTION: Identifies the date and time when the record was initially created in the source system.
SOURCEFIELD.NAME: CREATED_ON_DT

SOURCEFIELD.BUSINESSNAME: Source Record Last Modified Date and Time
SOURCEFIELD.DESCRIPTION: Identifies the date and time when the record was last modified in the source system.
SOURCEFIELD.NAME: CHANGED_ON_DT

SOURCEFIELD.BUSINESSNAME: Auxiliary Source Table Last Modified Date and Time
SOURCEFIELD.DESCRIPTION: Siebel System field. This column identifies the last modified date and time of the auxiliary table's record which acts as a source for the current table.
SOURCEFIELD.NAME: AUX1_CHANGED_ON_DT

SOURCEFIELD.BUSINESSNAME: Auxiliary Source Table Last Modified Date and Time
SOURCEFIELD.DESCRIPTION: Siebel System field. This column identifies the last modified date and time of the auxiliary table's record which acts as a source for the current table.
SOURCEFIELD.NAME: AUX2_CHANGED_ON_DT

SOURCEFIELD.BUSINESSNAME: Auxiliary Source Table Last Modified Date and Time

SOURCEFIELD.NAME: AUX3_CHANGED_ON_DT

SOURCEFIELD.BUSINESSNAME: Auxiliary Source Table Last Modified Date and Time
SOURCEFIELD.DESCRIPTION: Siebel System field. This column identifies the last modified date and time of the auxiliary table's record which acts as a source for the current table.
SOURCEFIELD.NAME: AUX4_CHANGED_ON_DT

SOURCEFIELD.DESCRIPTION: This flag indicates the deletion status of the record in the source system. A value of "Y" indicates that the record is deleted from the source system and logically deleted from the data warehouse; a value of "N" indicates that the record is active.
SOURCEFIELD.NAME: DELETE_FLG

SOURCEFIELD.BUSINESSNAME: Warehouse Record Insert Date and Time
SOURCEFIELD.DESCRIPTION: This column stores the date on which the record was inserted in the data warehouse table.
SOURCEFIELD.NAME: W_INSERT_DT

SOURCEFIELD.BUSINESSNAME: Warehouse Record Update Date and Time
SOURCEFIELD.DESCRIPTION: This column stores the date on which the record was last updated in the data warehouse table.
SOURCEFIELD.NAME: W_UPDATE_DT

SOURCEFIELD.DESCRIPTION: This column is the unique identifier of the source system from which data was extracted. In order to be able to trace the data back to its source, Siebel recommends that you define separate unique source IDs for each of your different source instances.
SOURCEFIELD.NAME: DATASOURCE_NUM_ID

SOURCEFIELD.DESCRIPTION: Siebel System Field. This column is the unique identifier for the specific ETL process used to create or update this data.
SOURCEFIELD.NAME: ETL_PROC_WID

SOURCEFIELD.DESCRIPTION: This column is the unique identifier of a dimension or fact entity in its source system. In case of composite keys, the value in this column can consist of concatenated parts.
SOURCEFIELD.NAME: INTEGRATION_ID

SOURCEFIELD.DESCRIPTION: This column is the unique identifier for a Tenant in a multi-tenant environment. This would typically be used in an Application Service Provider (ASP) / Software As a Service (SOAS) model.
SOURCEFIELD.NAME: TENANT_ID

SOURCEFIELD.DESCRIPTION: This column is used as a generic field for customer extensions.
SOURCEFIELD.NAME: X_CUSTOM

SOURCE.DESCRIPTION: W_XACT_TYPE_D dimension table defines various transaction types as available from the domain and cleint value lists. This table is designed to be a Type-1 dimension.

SOURCEFIELD.DESCRIPTION: Surrogate key to uniquely identify a record.

SOURCEFIELD.DESCRIPTION: Identifies the code of the transaction category. It is a grouping of transactions with similar characteristics. For example 'Asset posting' to group assets.
SOURCEFIELD.NAME: XACT_CAT_CODE

SOURCEFIELD.DESCRIPTION: Identifies the name of the transaction category.
SOURCEFIELD.NAME: XACT_CAT_NAME

SOURCEFIELD.DESCRIPTION: Identifies the transaction type code as defined in the source system. Transaction type is a specification of the source of the transaction.

SOURCE.DESCRIPTION:
W_USER_D dimension table contains information about users who created or modified records in the source system, from which the rows have been extracted. It has the contact and location information about the users. Since such a user can be potentially an Employee as well as Contractor, qualifying flags are also present in this table for informational purposes.
The grain of this table is at a single 'User' level. This table is designed to be a slowly/moderately changing dimension that supports Type-2 changes out of the box.
SOURCE.NAME: W_USER_D

SOURCEFIELD.DESCRIPTION: Surrogate key to uniquely identify a record.
SOURCEFIELD.NAME: ROW_WID

SOURCEFIELD.DESCRIPTION: First Name of the User
SOURCEFIELD.NAME: FIRST_NAME

SOURCEFIELD.DESCRIPTION: Middle Name of the User
SOURCEFIELD.NAME: MID_NAME

SOURCEFIELD.DESCRIPTION: Last Name of the User
SOURCEFIELD.NAME: LAST_NAME

SOURCEFIELD.DESCRIPTION: Full name of the user
SOURCEFIELD.NAME: FULL_NAME

SOURCEFIELD.DESCRIPTION: Name Prefix

SOURCEFIELD.DESCRIPTION: Name Suffix
SOURCEFIELD.NAME: NAME_SUFFIX

SOURCEFIELD.DESCRIPTION: Name Effective Date
SOURCEFIELD.NAME: NAME_EFF_DATE

SOURCEFIELD.DESCRIPTION: Sex M/F Code
SOURCEFIELD.NAME: SEX_MF_CODE

SOURCEFIELD.DESCRIPTION: Description of the Sex M/F Code
SOURCEFIELD.NAME: SEX_MF_NAME

SOURCE.DESCRIPTION: Product entity stores information about the Products of various product types viz., Finished Goods, Raw Material and other types of Products from the CRM, ERP & other source systems. The grain of this table is at the level of Unique Product defined in the source system?s Product Master. In some source systems, that support multiple plants/Orgs, a master plant/ Org is maintained to define the master list of products that can be further copied into other plants/ Orgs where some attributes can be changed. In such cases, this entity would hold the Products defined in the Master Plant/ Org. This table is designed to be a slowly changing dimension that supports
SOURCE.NAME: W_PRODUCT_D

SOURCE.DESCRIPTION:
W_EMPLOYEE_D dimension table stores personal information about employees belonging to this organization as well as its 'extended organization'. The concept of the 'extended organization' would take care of contractors, third party organizations and other non-employees who help us to run our business. Each of the employees (of our organization or the extended one) can play various roles while helping us run business. Out of the box, this table supports the following roles: Service Rep, Sales Rep, Account Rep, Purchase Rep, Buyer, Requestor, Contact Rep. Each of these roles are identified by their corresponding flags, with possible values 'Y' or 'N'.
The gr

SOURCE.DESCRIPTION:
W_JOB_D dimension table describes different jobs (not positions) in an organization and also is used for EEO reporting. For example, Manager is a job as opposed to Senior Manager Sales Western Region San Jose Office, which is a position. Jobs define the role that an employee can perform in the business group, and they are normally independent of specific organizations.
The grain of this dimension table is at a single 'Job' level. Examples of some attribute this table stores includes Job Name, Job Family, Fair Labor Standards Act (FLSA) Status, EEO Job Category and so on. This table is designed to be a slowly/moderately changing dimension that supports Typ
SOURCE.NAME: W_JOB_D

TARGET.DESCRIPTION: This fact table stores the cost distribution rows from the OLTP. It is used to provide raw and burdened cost metrics for billable, non-billable, capitalized, equipment and people costs. Cost metrics can be analyzed by Project, Task, Organizations, Resources (Resource Class, Job, Employee, Material Item, etc), Date, Period, etc

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup Sql Override
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: SELECT TARGET.ETL_PROC_WID as ETL_PROC_WID, TARGET.ROW_WID as ROW_WID, TARGET.DELETE_FLG as DELETE_FLG, TARGET.W_INSERT_DT as W_INSERT_DT, TARGET.INTEGRATION_ID as INTEGRATION_ID, TARGET.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID as DATASOURCE_NUM_ID FROM $$TARGET_TABLE TARGET, $$STAGE_TABLE STAGE WHERE STAGE.INTEGRATION_ID = TARGET.INTEGRATION_ID AND STAGE.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = TARGET.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID ORDER BY TARGET.INTEGRATION_ID, TARGET.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID --

TRANSFORMATION.DESCRIPTION: This lookup finds the Project Task row_wid based on the integration_id & datasource_num_id, used in cost/exp fact sil maps
TRANSFORMATION.NAME: LKP_W_TASK_DIM_for_ProjectCost

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup Sql Override
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: SELECT W_TASK_D.ROW_WID AS ROW_WID , W_TASK_D.SERVICE_TYPE_CODE AS SERVICE_TYPE_CODE , W_WORK_TYPE_D.ROW_WID AS WORK_TYPE_WID , W_TASK_D.TASK_OWNING_ORGANIZATION_ID AS TASK_OWNING_ORGANIZATION_ID, W_TASK_D.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID AS DATASOURCE_NUM_ID , W_TASK_D.INTEGRATION_ID AS INTEGRATION_ID FROM (W_TASK_D LEFT OUTER JOIN W_WORK_TYPE_D ON W_TASK_D.WORK_TYPE_ID = W_WORK_TYPE_D.INTEGRATION_ID AND W_TASK_D.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = W_WORK_TYPE_D.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID )

TRANSFORMATION.DESCRIPTION: Based on the Type1 Dimension's natural key and the DATASOURCE_NUM_ID, this lookup transformation is used to look for the corresponding surrogate key to be used as a foreign key in the fact/dimension table. For the incremental-load session, this lookup SQL will have an override joining with the staging area table on the Type1 Dimension's natural key column as well as the DATASOURCE_NUM_ID. This will restrict the cache being created for the Type1 dimension natural keys which have appeared in the current staging area records, and improve the overall performance.
TRANSFORMATION.NAME: LKP_W_PARTY_D

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup Sql Override
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: SELECT LOOKUP_TABLE.ROW_WID as ROW_WID, LOOKUP_TABLE.GEO_WID as GEO_WID, LOOKUP_TABLE.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID as DATASOURCE_NUM_ID, LOOKUP_TABLE.INTEGRATION_ID as INTEGRATION_ID, LOOKUP_TABLE.EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT as EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT, LOOKUP_TABLE.EFFECTIVE_TO_DT as EFFECTIVE_TO_DT FROM W_PARTY_D LOOKUP_TABLE

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup condition
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: INTEGRATION_ID = IN_INTEGRATION_ID AND DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = IN_DATASOURCE_NUM_ID AND EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT <= IN_DATE AND EFFECTIVE_TO_DT > IN_DATE

TRANSFORMATION.DESCRIPTION: Based on the Type1 Dimension's natural key and the DATASOURCE_NUM_ID, this lookup transformation is used to look for the corresponding surrogate key to be used as a foreign key in the fact/dimension table. For the incremental-load session, this lookup SQL will have an override joining with the staging area table on the Type1 Dimension's natural key column as well as the DATASOURCE_NUM_ID. This will restrict the cache being created for the Type1 dimension natural keys which have appeared in the current staging area records, and improve the overall performance.
TRANSFORMATION.NAME: LKP_W_XACT_TYPE_D

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup Sql Override
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: SELECT LOOKUP_TABLE.ROW_WID as ROW_WID, LOOKUP_TABLE.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID as DATASOURCE_NUM_ID, LOOKUP_TABLE.INTEGRATION_ID as INTEGRATION_ID FROM W_XACT_TYPE_D LOOKUP_TABLE

TRANSFORMATION.DESCRIPTION: If the PERIOD is null then this lookup finds the Period which contains the corresponding GL or PA Date.
TRANSFORMATION.NAME: LKP_W_MCAL_PERIOD_D_Get_Period_on_Date

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup condition
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = IN_DATASOURCE_NUM_ID AND MCAL_PERIOD_START_DAY_WID <= INP_MCAL_DATE_WID AND MCAL_PERIOD_END_DAY_WID >= INP_MCAL_DATE_WID

TRANSFORMATION.DESCRIPTION: Based on the Type2 Dimension's natural key, DATASOURCE_NUM_ID and a given date, this lookup transformation is used to look for the corresponding surrogate key to be used as a foreign key in the fact/dimension table. For the incremental-load session, this lookup SQL will probably have an override joining with the staging area table on the Type2 Dimension's natural key column as well as the DATASOURCE_NUM_ID. This will restrict the cache being created to the Type2 dimension natural keys which have appeared in the current staging area records, and improve the overall performance.
TRANSFORMATION.NAME: LKP_W_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_D_With_Party_ID

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup Sql Override
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: SELECT LOOKUP_TABLE.ROW_WID as ROW_WID, LOOKUP_TABLE.PARTY_ID as PARTY_ID, LOOKUP_TABLE.INTEGRATION_ID as INTEGRATION_ID, LOOKUP_TABLE.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID as DATASOURCE_NUM_ID, LOOKUP_TABLE.EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT as EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT, LOOKUP_TABLE.EFFECTIVE_TO_DT as EFFECTIVE_TO_DT FROM W_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_D LOOKUP_TABLE

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup condition
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: INTEGRATION_ID = IN_INTEGRATION_ID AND DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = IN_DATASOURCE_NUM_ID AND EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT <= IN_DATE AND EFFECTIVE_TO_DT > IN_DATE

TRANSFORMATION.DESCRIPTION: Based on the Type2 Dimension's natural key, DATASOURCE_NUM_ID and a given date, this lookup transformation is used to look for the corresponding surrogate key to be used as a foreign key in the fact/dimension table. For the incremental-load session, this lookup SQL will have an override joining with the staging area table on the Type2 Dimension's natural key column as well as the DATASOURCE_NUM_ID. This will restrict the cache being created for the Type2 dimension natural keys which have appeared in the current staging area records, and improve the overall performance.
TRANSFORMATION.NAME: LKP_W_INT_ORG_D

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup Sql Override
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: SELECT LOOKUP_TABLE.ROW_WID as ROW_WID, LOOKUP_TABLE.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID as DATASOURCE_NUM_ID, LOOKUP_TABLE.INTEGRATION_ID as INTEGRATION_ID, LOOKUP_TABLE.EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT as EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT, LOOKUP_TABLE.EFFECTIVE_TO_DT as EFFECTIVE_TO_DT FROM W_INT_ORG_D LOOKUP_TABLE

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup condition
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = IN_DATASOURCE_NUM_ID AND INTEGRATION_ID = IN_INTEGRATION_ID AND EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT <= IN_DATE AND EFFECTIVE_TO_DT > IN_DATE

TRANSFORMATION.DESCRIPTION: Based on the Type2 Dimension's natural key, DATASOURCE_NUM_ID and a given date, this lookup transformation is used to look for the corresponding surrogate key to be used as a foreign key in the fact/dimension table. For the incremental-load session, this lookup SQL will have an override joining with the staging area table on the Type2 Dimension's natural key column as well as the DATASOURCE_NUM_ID. This will restrict the cache being created for the Type2 dimension natural keys which have appeared in the current staging area records, and improve the overall performance.
TRANSFORMATION.NAME: LKP_W_GL_ACCOUNT_D

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup Sql Override
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: SELECT LOOKUP_TABLE.ROW_WID as ROW_WID, LOOKUP_TABLE.COST_CENTER_NUM AS COST_CENTER_NUM, LOOKUP_TABLE.COST_CENTER_ATTRIB AS COST_CENTER_ATTRIB, LOOKUP_TABLE.PROFIT_CENTER_NUM AS PROFIT_CENTER_NUM, LOOKUP_TABLE.PROFIT_CENTER_ATTRIB AS PROFIT_CENTER_ATTRIB, LOOKUP_TABLE.GROUP_ACCOUNT_NUM AS GROUP_ACCOUNT_NUM, LOOKUP_TABLE.GL_ACCOUNT_NUM AS GL_ACCOUNT_NUM, LOOKUP_TABLE.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID as DATASOURCE_NUM_ID, LOOKUP_TABLE.INTEGRATION_ID as INTEGRATION_ID, LOOKUP_TABLE.EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT as EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT, LOOKUP_TABLE.EFFECTIVE_TO_DT as EFFECTIVE_TO_DT FROM W_GL_ACCOUNT_D LOOKUP_TABLE

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup condition
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = IN_DATASOURCE_NUM_ID AND INTEGRATION_ID = IN_INTEGRATION_ID AND EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT <= IN_DATE AND EFFECTIVE_TO_DT > IN_DATE

TRANSFORMATION.DESCRIPTION: This lookup has the current flag set to Y and is used in Project fact SIL maps to get the current proj manager.
TRANSFORMATION.NAME: LKP_W_EMPLOYEE_D_PROJ_MGR

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup Sql Override
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: SELECT LOOKUP_TABLE.ROW_WID as ROW_WID, LOOKUP_TABLE.INTEGRATION_ID as INTEGRATION_ID, LOOKUP_TABLE.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID as DATASOURCE_NUM_ID FROM W_EMPLOYEE_D LOOKUP_TABLE WHERE LOOKUP_TABLE.CURRENT_FLG= 'Y'

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup condition
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: CITY = INP_CITY AND COUNTRY = INP_COUNTRY AND STATE_PROV = INP_STATE_PROV AND ZIPCODE = INP_ZIPCODE

TRANSFORMATION.DESCRIPTION: SELECT VAL FROM W_LST_OF_VAL_G
TRANSFORMATION.NAME: LKP_W_LST_OF_VAL_G_Get_Val

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup Sql Override
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: SELECT W_LST_OF_VAL_G.VAL as VAL, W_LST_OF_VAL_G.R_TYPE as R_TYPE FROM W_LST_OF_VAL_G WHERE W_LST_OF_VAL_G.R_TYPE LIKE 'ETL%'

TRANSFORMATION.DESCRIPTION: This sequence generator transformation is used to generate surrogate keys for the table W_AGREEITEM_F. This is a reusable transformation and should be used for every source system adapters in order to ensure unique keys across the source system adapters like Oracle Applications, SAP, PeopleSoft and so on.
TRANSFORMATION.NAME: Seq_W_PROJ_COST_LINE_F_Wid

TRANSFORMATION.DESCRIPTION: CHECKS FOR NULL WIDS AND DEFAULTS TO ETL_UNSPEC_NUM IF NULL.
TRANSFORMATION.NAME: EXP_CHECK_NULL_WID

TRANSFORMATION.DESCRIPTION: This is a reusable expression transformation to be used by all Type1 dimension load mappings. Given inputs like Update Flag value, the Next value from Sequence Generator and the current ROW_WID value from the target table, it gives back the right ROW_WID to be used in the target table.
TRANSFORMATION.NAME: EXP_SCD1_WID

TRANSFORMATION.DESCRIPTION: Looks up W_PARAM_G for the ETL_PROC_WID
TRANSFORMATION.NAME: LKP_W_PARAM_G_Get_ETL_PROC_WID

TRANSFORMATION.DESCRIPTION: Based on the source code value and the DATASOURCE_NUM_ID, this lookup transformation is used to look for the standardized CODE - NAME pair for the category "COUNTRY" in the chosen data warehouse language, the value of which is passed through mapping parameters during the load process.

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup Sql Override
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: SELECT W_CODE_D.MASTER_CODE as MASTER_CODE, W_CODE_D.MASTER_VALUE as MASTER_VALUE, W_CODE_D.SOURCE_CODE as SOURCE_CODE, W_CODE_D.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID as DATASOURCE_NUM_ID FROM W_CODE_D WHERE W_CODE_D.CATEGORY = 'COUNTRY' AND W_CODE_D.LANGUAGE_CODE = '$$LANGUAGE_CODE'

TRANSFORMATION.DESCRIPTION: Based on the source code value and the DATASOURCE_NUM_ID, this lookup transformation is used to look for the standardized CODE - NAME pair for the category "STATE" in the chosen data warehouse language, the value of which is passed through mapping parameters during the load process.

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup Sql Override

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup Sql Override
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: SELECT DISTINCT LOOKUP_TABLE.ROW_WID as ROW_WID, LOOKUP_TABLE.COST_CENTER_NUM AS COST_CENTER_NUM, LOOKUP_TABLE.COST_CENTER_ATTRIB AS COST_CENTER_ATTRIB, LOOKUP_TABLE.PROFIT_CENTER_NUM AS PROFIT_CENTER_NUM, LOOKUP_TABLE.PROFIT_CENTER_ATTRIB AS PROFIT_CENTER_ATTRIB, LOOKUP_TABLE.GROUP_ACCOUNT_NUM AS GROUP_ACCOUNT_NUM, LOOKUP_TABLE.GL_ACCOUNT_NUM AS GL_ACCOUNT_NUM, LOOKUP_TABLE.ACCOUNT_SEG1_CODE AS ACCOUNT_SEG1_CODE, LOOKUP_TABLE.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID as DATASOURCE_NUM_ID, LOOKUP_TABLE.INTEGRATION_ID as INTEGRATION_ID, LOOKUP_TABLE.EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT as EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT, LOOKUP_TABLE.EFFECTIVE_TO_DT as EFFECTIVE_TO_DT FROM W_GL_ACCOUNT_D LOOKUP_TABLE, W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS A WHERE A.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = LOOKUP_TABLE.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID AND A.COST_GL_ACCOUNT_ID= LOOKUP_TABLE.INTEGRATION_ID ORDER BY LOOKUP_TABLE.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID, LOOKUP_TABLE.INTEGRATION_ID, LOOKUP_TABLE.EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT, LOOKUP_TABLE.EFFECTIVE_TO_DT, LOOKUP_TABLE.ROW_WID --

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup Sql Override
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: SELECT $$HINT1 LOOKUP_TABLE.ROW_WID as ROW_WID, LOOKUP_TABLE.GEO_WID as GEO_WID, LOOKUP_TABLE.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID as DATASOURCE_NUM_ID, LOOKUP_TABLE.INTEGRATION_ID as INTEGRATION_ID, LOOKUP_TABLE.EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT as EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT, LOOKUP_TABLE.EFFECTIVE_TO_DT as EFFECTIVE_TO_DT FROM W_PARTY_D LOOKUP_TABLE WHERE LOOKUP_TABLE.PARTY_TYPE_CODE='O' AND LOOKUP_TABLE.ACCNT_FLG = 'Y'

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup Sql Override
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: SELECT $$HINT1 LOOKUP_TABLE.ROW_WID as ROW_WID, LOOKUP_TABLE.GEO_WID as GEO_WID, LOOKUP_TABLE.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID as DATASOURCE_NUM_ID, LOOKUP_TABLE.INTEGRATION_ID as INTEGRATION_ID, LOOKUP_TABLE.EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT as EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT, LOOKUP_TABLE.EFFECTIVE_TO_DT as EFFECTIVE_TO_DT FROM W_PARTY_D LOOKUP_TABLE WHERE LOOKUP_TABLE.PARTY_TYPE_CODE='O' AND LOOKUP_TABLE.ACCNT_FLG = 'Y'

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup Sql Override
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: SELECT W_TASK_D.ROW_WID AS ROW_WID , W_TASK_D.SERVICE_TYPE_CODE AS SERVICE_TYPE_CODE , W_WORK_TYPE_D.ROW_WID AS WORK_TYPE_WID , W_TASK_D.TASK_OWNING_ORGANIZATION_ID AS TASK_OWNING_ORGANIZATION_ID, W_TASK_D.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID AS DATASOURCE_NUM_ID , W_TASK_D.INTEGRATION_ID AS INTEGRATION_ID FROM W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS A , (W_TASK_D LEFT OUTER JOIN W_WORK_TYPE_D ON W_TASK_D.WORK_TYPE_ID = W_WORK_TYPE_D.INTEGRATION_ID AND W_TASK_D.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = W_WORK_TYPE_D.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID ) WHERE A.TASK_ID = W_TASK_D.INTEGRATION_ID AND A.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = W_TASK_D.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID ORDER BY W_TASK_D.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID, W_TASK_D.INTEGRATION_ID, W_TASK_D.ROW_WID, W_TASK_D.SERVICE_TYPE_CODE,WORK_TYPE_WID, W_TASK_D.TASK_OWNING_ORGANIZATION_ID --

MAPPLET.DESCRIPTION: This mapplet is responsible for getting the correct exchange rates for a date chosen, where a currency conversion to any of the three possible global currencies is involved.
MAPPLET.NAME: MPLT_CURCY_CONVERSION_RATES_ToGlobalCurrenciesOnly

TRANSFORMFIELD.EXPRESSION: IIF(ISNULL(DOC_TO_LOC_EXCH_RATE), IIF(LOC_CURR_CODE = DOC_CURR_CODE, 1.0, IIF(DOC_CURR_CODE = 'STAT', 1.0, IIF(ISNULL(LOC_CURR_CODE), NULL, :LKP.LKP_W_EXCH_RATE(DOC_CURR_CODE,LOC_CURR_CODE,EXCH_DT,LOC_RATE_TYPE_VAR,DATASOURCE_NUM_ID)))), DOC_TO_LOC_EXCH_RATE)
TRANSFORMFIELD.NAME: DOC_TO_LOC_EXCH_RATE_VAR

TRANSFORMFIELD.EXPRESSION: IIF(ISNULL(GLOBAL1_CURR_CODE), NULL, IIF(GLOBAL1_CURR_CODE = DOC_CURR_CODE, 1.0, IIF(DOC_CURR_CODE = 'STAT', 1.0, --IIF(GLOBAL1_CURR_CODE = LOC_CURR_CODE, DOC_TO_LOC_EXCH_RATE_VAR, :LKP.LKP_W_EXCH_RATE(DOC_CURR_CODE, GLOBAL1_CURR_CODE, EXCH_DT,GLOBAL1_RATE_TYPE, DATASOURCE_NUM_ID))))
TRANSFORMFIELD.NAME: DOC_TO_GLOBAL1_EXCH_RATE_VAR

TRANSFORMFIELD.EXPRESSION: IIF(ISNULL(GLOBAL2_CURR_CODE), NULL, -- IIF(GLOBAL2_CURR_CODE = GLOBAL1_CURR_CODE, DOC_TO_GLOBAL1_EXCH_RATE_VAR, IIF(GLOBAL2_CURR_CODE = DOC_CURR_CODE, 1.0, IIF(DOC_CURR_CODE = 'STAT', 1.0, --IIF(GLOBAL2_CURR_CODE = LOC_CURR_CODE, DOC_TO_LOC_EXCH_RATE_VAR, :LKP.LKP_W_EXCH_RATE(DOC_CURR_CODE, GLOBAL2_CURR_CODE, EXCH_DT,GLOBAL2_RATE_TYPE, DATASOURCE_NUM_ID))))
TRANSFORMFIELD.NAME: DOC_TO_GLOBAL2_EXCH_RATE_VAR

TRANSFORMFIELD.EXPRESSION: IIF(ISNULL(GLOBAL3_CURR_CODE), NULL, --IIF(GLOBAL3_CURR_CODE = GLOBAL1_CURR_CODE, DOC_TO_GLOBAL1_EXCH_RATE_VAR, --IIF(GLOBAL3_CURR_CODE = GLOBAL2_CURR_CODE, DOC_TO_GLOBAL2_EXCH_RATE_VAR, IIF(GLOBAL3_CURR_CODE = DOC_CURR_CODE, 1.0, IIF(DOC_CURR_CODE = 'STAT', 1.0, --IIF(GLOBAL3_CURR_CODE = LOC_CURR_CODE, DOC_TO_LOC_EXCH_RATE_VAR, :LKP.LKP_W_EXCH_RATE(DOC_CURR_CODE, GLOBAL3_CURR_CODE, EXCH_DT,GLOBAL3_RATE_TYPE, DATASOURCE_NUM_ID))))
TRANSFORMFIELD.NAME: DOC_TO_GLOBAL3_EXCH_RATE_VAR

TRANSFORMATION.DESCRIPTION: For a given "from currency code" and exchange date, this lookup finds the conversion rate to the three possible global currency codes.
TRANSFORMATION.NAME: LKP_W_EXCH_RATE

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup Sql Override
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: SELECT W_EXCH_RATE_G.EXCH_RATE AS EXCH_RATE, W_EXCH_RATE_G.FROM_CURCY_CD AS FROM_CURCY_CD, W_EXCH_RATE_G.TO_CURCY_CD AS TO_CURCY_CD, W_EXCH_RATE_G.START_DT AS START_DT, W_EXCH_RATE_G.END_DT AS END_DT, W_EXCH_RATE_G.RATE_TYPE AS RATE_TYPE, W_EXCH_RATE_G.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID AS DATASOURCE_NUM_ID FROM W_EXCH_RATE_G, ( SELECT GLOBAL1_CURR_CODE REQUIRED_TO_CURR, GLOBAL1_RATE_TYPE REQUIRED_RATE_TYPE, DATASOURCE_NUM_ID DSN FROM W_GLOBAL_CURR_G UNION SELECT GLOBAL2_CURR_CODE REQUIRED_TO_CURR, GLOBAL2_RATE_TYPE REQUIRED_RATE_TYPE, DATASOURCE_NUM_ID DSN FROM W_GLOBAL_CURR_G UNION SELECT GLOBAL3_CURR_CODE REQUIRED_TO_CURR, GLOBAL3_RATE_TYPE REQUIRED_RATE_TYPE, DATASOURCE_NUM_ID DSN FROM W_GLOBAL_CURR_G ) GLOBAL_CURR WHERE W_EXCH_RATE_G.TO_CURCY_CD = GLOBAL_CURR.REQUIRED_TO_CURR AND W_EXCH_RATE_G.RATE_TYPE = GLOBAL_CURR.REQUIRED_RATE_TYPE AND W_EXCH_RATE_G.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = GLOBAL_CURR.DSN

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup condition
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: FROM_CURCY_CD = IN_FROM_CURCY_CD AND TO_CURCY_CD = IN_TO_CURCY_CD AND START_DT <= IN_EXCH_DT AND RATE_TYPE = IN_RATE_TYPE AND DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = IN_DATASOURCE_NUM_ID

TRANSFORMATION.DESCRIPTION: This mapplet is responsible for getting the correct exchange rates for a date chosen, where a currency conversion to any of the three possible global currencies is involved.
TRANSFORMATION.NAME: MPLT_CURCY_CONVERSION_RATES_ToGlobalCurrenciesOnly

INSTANCE.DESCRIPTION: For a given "from currency code" and exchange date, this lookup finds the conversion rate to the three possible global currency codes.
INSTANCE.NAME: LKP_W_EXCH_RATE

METADATAEXTENSION.DESCRIPTION: The target data model version that this mapping is designed to load
METADATAEXTENSION.NAME: OLAP_Version

TRANSFORMFIELD.DESCRIPTION: This identifies the corresponding master code for the source code.
TRANSFORMFIELD.NAME: LKP_CITY_NAME

TRANSFORMFIELD.EXPRESSION: IIF(ISNULL(LKP_CITY_NAME), IIF(ISNULL(CITY_NAME) OR LENGTH(CITY_NAME) = 0 OR IS_SPACES(CITY_NAME), 'Unspecified', CITY_NAME), LKP_CITY_NAME)
TRANSFORMFIELD.NAME: OUT_CITY_NAME

TRANSFORMFIELD.EXPRESSION: IIF(ISNULL(LKP_STATE_CODE), IIF(ISNULL(STATE_CODE) OR LENGTH(STATE_CODE) = 0 OR IS_SPACES(STATE_CODE),'Unspecified', STATE_CODE), LKP_STATE_CODE)
TRANSFORMFIELD.NAME: OUT_STATE_CODE

TRANSFORMFIELD.EXPRESSION: IIF(ISNULL(LKP_COUNTRY_CODE), IIF(ISNULL(COUNTRY_CODE) OR LENGTH(COUNTRY_CODE) = 0 OR IS_SPACES(COUNTRY_CODE), 'Unspecified', COUNTRY_CODE), LKP_COUNTRY_CODE)
TRANSFORMFIELD.NAME: OUT_COUNTRY_CODE

TRANSFORMFIELD.EXPRESSION: IIF(ISNULL(LKP_STATE_NAME), IIF(ISNULL(LKP_STATE_CODE), IIF(ISNULL(STATE_NAME), IIF(ISNULL(STATE_CODE),$$SOURCE_CODE_NOT_SUPPLIED,STATE_CODE), STATE_NAME), NULL), LKP_STATE_NAME)
TRANSFORMFIELD.NAME: OUT_STATE_NAME

TRANSFORMFIELD.EXPRESSION: IIF(ISNULL(LKP_COUNTRY_NAME), IIF(ISNULL(LKP_COUNTRY_CODE), IIF(ISNULL(COUNTRY_NAME), IIF(ISNULL(COUNTRY_CODE),$$SOURCE_CODE_NOT_SUPPLIED, COUNTRY_CODE), COUNTRY_NAME), NULL), LKP_COUNTRY_NAME)
TRANSFORMFIELD.NAME: OUT_COUNTRY_NAME

TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: SELECT W_CODE_D.MASTER_CODE as MASTER_CODE, W_CODE_D.MASTER_VALUE as MASTER_VALUE, W_CODE_D.SOURCE_CODE_1 as SOURCE_CODE_1, W_CODE_D.SOURCE_CODE_2 as SOURCE_CODE_2, W_CODE_D.SOURCE_NAME_1 as SOURCE_NAME_1, W_CODE_D.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID as DATASOURCE_NUM_ID FROM W_CODE_D WHERE W_CODE_D.CATEGORY = 'CITY' AND W_CODE_D.LANGUAGE_CODE = '$$LANGUAGE_CODE'

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup condition
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = IN_DATASOURCE_NUM_ID AND SOURCE_CODE_1 = IN_SOURCE_CODE_1 AND SOURCE_CODE_2 = IN_SOURCE_CODE_2 AND SOURCE_NAME_1 = IN_SOURCE_NAME_1

MAPPING.DESCRIPTION: This mapping is responsible for loading fact records for the table W_PROJ_COST_LINE_F based on the corresponding staging area table. This mapping takes care of inserting new records as well as updating existing records in the target table. On a requirement basis, this mapping also 'soft-deletes' records from the target table (meaning, marking a record as 'Deleted' instead of physically deleting them)..
MAPPING.NAME: SIL_ProjectCostLine_Fact

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Sql Query
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE:
SELECT W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.TASK_ID , W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.GL_ACCOUNTING_DT , COALESCE(W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.PROVIDER_GL_ACCOUNTING_DT,W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.GL_ACCOUNTING_DT) PROVIDER_GL_ACCOUNTING_DT , W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.PROJ_ACCOUNTING_DT , W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.EXPENDITURE_DT , W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.RESOURCE_ORGANIZATION_ID , W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.EXPENDITURE_ORGANIZATION_ID , W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.EXPENDITURE_OPER_UNIT_ID , W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.INCURRED_BY_ORGANIZATION_ID , W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.COST_GL_ACCOUNT_ID , W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID , W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.PRODUCT_ID , W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.ENTERED_BY_EMP_ID , W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.INCURRED_BY_EMP_ID , W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.VENDOR_ID , W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.EXPENDITURE_ITEM_ID , W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.LINE_NUM , W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.REVERSED_FLG , W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.BILLABLE_FLG , W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.CAPITALIZABLE_FLG , W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.LINE_TYPE , W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.QUANTITY , W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.DOC_RAW_COST , W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.DOC_BURDENED_COST , W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.DOC_CURR_CODE , W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.LOC_CURR_CODE , W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.PROJ_CURR_CODE , W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.LOC_EXCH_RATE_TYPE , W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.LOC_EXCH_RATE_DATE , W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.LOC_EXCHANGE_RATE , W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.PROJ_EXCH_RATE_TYPE , W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.PROJ_EXCH_RATE_DATE , W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.PROJ_EXCHANGE_RATE , W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.CREATED_BY_ID , W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.CHANGED_BY_ID , W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.CREATED_ON_DT , W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.CHANGED_ON_DT , W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.AUX1_CHANGED_ON_DT , W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.AUX2_CHANGED_ON_DT , W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.AUX3_CHANGED_ON_DT , W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.AUX4_CHANGED_ON_DT , ,W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.X_ORIG_TRANSACTION_REFERENCE ,W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.X_GL_TRANSFER_DATE ,W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.X_CORRECTION_DATE ,W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.X_EXPENDITURE_END_DATE FROM W_PROJECT_ROLE_D , -- W_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_D CUST, -- W_PARTY_D PARTY WHERE { W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS INNER JOIN W_PROJECT_D ON W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.PROJECT_ID = W_PROJECT_D.INTEGRATION_ID AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = W_PROJECT_D.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN PA_CAL ON W_PROJECT_D.PROJ_OPERATING_UNIT_ID = PA_CAL.ORG_ID AND W_PROJECT_D.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = PA_CAL.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID AND PA_CAL."CLASS" = 'PROJECTS' LEFT OUTER JOIN GL_CAL ON W_PROJECT_D.LEDGER_ID = GL_CAL.LEDGER_ID AND W_PROJECT_D.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = GL_CAL.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID AND GL_CAL."CLASS" = 'GL' LEFT OUTER JOIN PROJ_OPER_UNIT ON W_PROJECT_D.PROJ_OPERATING_UNIT_ID = PROJ_OPER_UNIT.INTEGRATION_ID AND W_PROJECT_D.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = PROJ_OPER_UNIT.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.GL_ACCOUNTING_DT >= PROJ_OPER_UNIT.EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.GL_ACCOUNTING_DT < PROJ_OPER_UNIT.EFFECTIVE_TO_DT LEFT OUTER JOIN OPERATING_UNIT ON W_PROJECT_D.OPERATING_UNIT_ORG_ID = OPERATING_UNIT.INTEGRATION_ID AND W_PROJECT_D.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = OPERATING_UNIT.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.GL_ACCOUNTING_DT >= OPERATING_UNIT.EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.GL_ACCOUNTING_DT < OPERATING_UNIT.EFFECTIVE_TO_DT LEFT OUTER JOIN EXPENDITURE_OPER_UNIT ON W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.EXPENDITURE_OPER_UNIT_ID = EXPENDITURE_OPER_UNIT.INTEGRATION_ID AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = EXPENDITURE_OPER_UNIT.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.GL_ACCOUNTING_DT >= EXPENDITURE_OPER_UNIT.EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.GL_ACCOUNTING_DT < EXPENDITURE_OPER_UNIT.EFFECTIVE_TO_DT LEFT OUTER JOIN EXPENDITURE_ORGANIZATION ON W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.EXPENDITURE_ORGANIZATION_ID = EXPENDITURE_ORGANIZATION.INTEGRATION_ID AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = EXPENDITURE_ORGANIZATION.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.GL_ACCOUNTING_DT >= EXPENDITURE_ORGANIZATION.EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.GL_ACCOUNTING_DT < EXPENDITURE_ORGANIZATION.EFFECTIVE_TO_DT LEFT OUTER JOIN RESOURCE_ORGANIZATION ON W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.RESOURCE_ORGANIZATION_ID = RESOURCE_ORGANIZATION.INTEGRATION_ID AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = RESOURCE_ORGANIZATION.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.GL_ACCOUNTING_DT >= RESOURCE_ORGANIZATION.EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.GL_ACCOUNTING_DT < RESOURCE_ORGANIZATION.EFFECTIVE_TO_DT LEFT OUTER JOIN INCURRED_BY_ORGANIZATION ON W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.INCURRED_BY_ORGANIZATION_ID = INCURRED_BY_ORGANIZATION.INTEGRATION_ID AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = INCURRED_BY_ORGANIZATION.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.GL_ACCOUNTING_DT >= INCURRED_BY_ORGANIZATION.EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.GL_ACCOUNTING_DT < INCURRED_BY_ORGANIZATION.EFFECTIVE_TO_DT LEFT OUTER JOIN ENTERED_BY_EMP ON W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.ENTERED_BY_EMP_ID = ENTERED_BY_EMP.INTEGRATION_ID AND $$OHR_DSN = ENTERED_BY_EMP.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.GL_ACCOUNTING_DT >= ENTERED_BY_EMP.EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.GL_ACCOUNTING_DT <= ENTERED_BY_EMP.EFFECTIVE_TO_DT AND ENTERED_BY_EMP.DELETE_FLG = 'N' LEFT OUTER JOIN INCURRED_BY_EMP ON W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.INCURRED_BY_EMP_ID = INCURRED_BY_EMP.INTEGRATION_ID AND $$OHR_DSN = INCURRED_BY_EMP.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.GL_ACCOUNTING_DT >= INCURRED_BY_EMP.EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.GL_ACCOUNTING_DT < =INCURRED_BY_EMP.EFFECTIVE_TO_DT AND INCURRED_BY_EMP.DELETE_FLG = 'N' LEFT OUTER JOIN W_USER_D ON W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.CHANGED_BY_ID = W_USER_D.INTEGRATION_ID AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = W_USER_D.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.GL_ACCOUNTING_DT >= W_USER_D.EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.GL_ACCOUNTING_DT < W_USER_D.EFFECTIVE_TO_DT LEFT OUTER JOIN USER_CREATED ON W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.CREATED_BY_ID = USER_CREATED.INTEGRATION_ID AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = USER_CREATED.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.GL_ACCOUNTING_DT >= USER_CREATED.EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.GL_ACCOUNTING_DT < USER_CREATED.EFFECTIVE_TO_DT LEFT OUTER JOIN BOM ON W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.MFG_RESOURCE_BOM_ID = BOM.INTEGRATION_ID AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = BOM.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN NL ON W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.MFG_RESOURCE_NL_ID = NL.INTEGRATION_ID AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = NL.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN W_FINANCIAL_RESOURCE_D ON W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.FINANCIAL_RESOURCE_ID = W_FINANCIAL_RESOURCE_D.INTEGRATION_ID AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = W_FINANCIAL_RESOURCE_D.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN PA_PERIOD ON W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.PROJ_ACCOUNTING_PERIOD_ID = PA_PERIOD.INTEGRATION_ID AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = PA_PERIOD.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN GL_PERIOD ON W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.GL_ACCOUNTING_PERIOD_ID = GL_PERIOD.INTEGRATION_ID AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = GL_PERIOD.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN W_PROJECT_ROLE_D ON W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.PROJ_ROLE_ID = W_PROJECT_ROLE_D.INTEGRATION_ID AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = W_PROJECT_ROLE_D.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN EXP_CLASS ON W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.EXPENDITURE_CLASS_ID = EXP_CLASS.INTEGRATION_ID AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = EXP_CLASS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN RESOURCE_CLASS ON W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.RESOURCE_CLASS_ID = RESOURCE_CLASS.INTEGRATION_ID AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = RESOURCE_CLASS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN W_WORK_TYPE_D ON W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.WORK_TYPE_ID = W_WORK_TYPE_D.INTEGRATION_ID AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = W_WORK_TYPE_D.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN W_STATUS_D ON W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.TRANSFER_STATUS_ID = W_STATUS_D.INTEGRATION_ID AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = W_STATUS_D.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN W_CODE_D ON W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.UOM = W_CODE_D.SOURCE_CODE AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = W_CODE_D.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID AND W_CODE_D.CATEGORY = 'UOM' AND W_CODE_D.LANGUAGE_CODE = '$$LANGUAGE_CODE' LEFT OUTER JOIN W_PRODUCT_D ON W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.PRODUCT_ID = W_PRODUCT_D.INTEGRATION_ID AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = W_PRODUCT_D.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.GL_ACCOUNTING_DT >= W_PRODUCT_D.EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.GL_ACCOUNTING_DT < W_PRODUCT_D.EFFECTIVE_TO_DT LEFT OUTER JOIN W_PARTY_ORG_D ON W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.VENDOR_ID = W_PARTY_ORG_D.SUPPLIER_ID AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = W_PARTY_ORG_D.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.GL_ACCOUNTING_DT >= W_PARTY_ORG_D.EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.GL_ACCOUNTING_DT < W_PARTY_ORG_D.EFFECTIVE_TO_DT AND W_PARTY_ORG_D.SUPPLIER_ID IS NOT NULL LEFT OUTER JOIN W_JOB_D ON TRIM(W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.X_JOB_CODE) = TRIM(W_JOB_D.JOB_NAME) AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = W_JOB_D.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.GL_ACCOUNTING_DT >= W_JOB_D.EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.GL_ACCOUNTING_DT < W_JOB_D.EFFECTIVE_TO_DT LEFT OUTER JOIN BILL_JOB ON W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.BILL_JOB_ID = BILL_JOB.INTEGRATION_ID AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = BILL_JOB.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.GL_ACCOUNTING_DT >= BILL_JOB.EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.GL_ACCOUNTING_DT < BILL_JOB.EFFECTIVE_TO_DT LEFT OUTER JOIN W_INVENTORY_PRODUCT_D ON W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID = W_INVENTORY_PRODUCT_D.INTEGRATION_ID AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = W_INVENTORY_PRODUCT_D.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.GL_ACCOUNTING_DT >= W_INVENTORY_PRODUCT_D.EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.GL_ACCOUNTING_DT < W_INVENTORY_PRODUCT_D.EFFECTIVE_TO_DT LEFT OUTER JOIN BU1 ON W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.X_CONTROL_PU = BU1.PU LEFT OUTER JOIN BU2 ON W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.X_CHARGED_PU = BU2.PU LEFT OUTER JOIN ASSIGN_PU ON W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.X_ASSIGNED_PU_ID = ASSIGN_PU.PU LEFT OUTER JOIN LE1 ON NVL(TO_CHAR(W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.X_CC_PRVDR_ORGANIZATION_ID),'Unspecified') = LE1.ORG_NUM AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = LE1.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN LE2 ON NVL(TO_CHAR(W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.X_CC_RECVR_ORGANIZATION_ID),'Unspecified') = LE2.ORG_NUM AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = LE2.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID --LEFT OUTER JOIN CUST ON W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.X_TASK_CUSTOMER_ID = CUST.INTEGRATION_ID -- AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = CUST.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID -- AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.GL_ACCOUNTING_DT >= CUST.EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT W_PROJECT_D.PROJ_MGR_ID , W_PROJECT_D.CITY , W_PROJECT_D.REGION , W_PROJECT_D.COUNTRY , W_PROJECT_D.ZIPCODE , W_PROJECT_D.PROJ_ORGANIZATION_ID , W_PROJECT_D.PROJ_OPERATING_UNIT_ID , W_PROJECT_D.OPERATING_UNIT_ORG_ID , W_PROJECT_D.PROJ_PR_CUSTOMER_ID, W_PROJECT_D.PROJ_PR_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_ID , W_PROJECT_D.LEDGER_ID , W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.JOB_ID , W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.BILL_JOB_ID , BOM.ROW_WID , NL.ROW_WID , W_FINANCIAL_RESOURCE_D.ROW_WID , EXP_CLASS.ROW_WID , PA_PERIOD.ROW_WID , GL_PERIOD.ROW_WID , W_PROJECT_ROLE_D.ROW_WID , W_STATUS_D.ROW_WID , RESOURCE_CLASS.ROW_WID , W_WORK_TYPE_D.ROW_WID , W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.LOC_RAW_COST , W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.LOC_BURDENED_COST , W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.PROJ_RAW_COST , W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.PROJ_BURDENED_COST , W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.TRANSACTION_SOURCE , W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.BURDEN_COST_RATE , W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.RAW_COST_RATE , PA_CAL.MCAL_CAL_WID , GL_CAL.MCAL_CAL_WID , W_CODE_D.MASTER_CODE , W_PRODUCT_D.ROW_WID , W_PARTY_ORG_D.ROW_WID , W_JOB_D.ROW_WID , BILL_JOB.ROW_WID , PROJ_OPER_UNIT.ROW_WID , OPERATING_UNIT.ROW_WID , EXPENDITURE_OPER_UNIT.ROW_WID , EXPENDITURE_ORGANIZATION.ROW_WID , RESOURCE_ORGANIZATION.ROW_WID , INCURRED_BY_ORGANIZATION.ROW_WID , USER_CREATED.ROW_WID , W_USER_D.ROW_WID , W_INVENTORY_PRODUCT_D.ROW_WID, W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.X_ATTRIBUTE8, W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.X_RAW_COST, W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.X_COST_BURDEN_DIST_FLAG, W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.X_BILL_HOLD_FLAG, W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.X_BURDEN_COST, W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.X_COST_DIST_REJECTION_CODE, W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.X_CC_CROSS_CHARGE_TYPE, W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.X_CC_IC_PROCESSED_CODE, W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.X_BILL_JOB_BILLING_TITLE, W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.X_ATTRIBUTE2, W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.X_ATTRIBUTE5, W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.X_TRANSACTION_SOURCE, W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.X_CC_CROSS_CHARGE_CODE, NVL(BU1.ROW_WID,'0'), W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.X_INVOICE_NUM, W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.X_INVOICE_DATE, W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.X_PO_NUM, W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.X_NON_LABOR_RESOURCE, NVL(BU2.ROW_WID,'0'), NVL(LE1.ROW_WID,'0'), NVL(LE2.ROW_WID,'0'), W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.X_FUNC_CURR_CODE, W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.X_FUNC_BURDENED_COST, W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.X_FUNC_RAW_COST, W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.X_TASK_CUSTOMER_ID, GL_PERIOD.MCAL_PERIOD_END_DT, W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.X_SOURCE_TYPE, -- NVL(PARTY.ROW_WID,'0'), -- NVL(CUST.ROW_WID,'0'), W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.X_WORKSHARE_FLG, W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.X_PRDR_DENOM_RAW_COST, W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.X_PRDR_DENOM_BURDENED_COST, W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.X_PRDR_FUNC_RAW_COST, W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.X_PRDR_PROJFUNC_RAW_COST, W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.X_PRDR_PROJ_RAW_COST, W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.X_PRDR_FUNC_BURDENED_COST, W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.X_PRDR_PROJFUNC_BURDENED_COST, W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.X_PRDR_PROJ_BURDENED_COST, W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.X_PRDR_DENOM_CURR_CODE, W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.X_DUP_RECORDS_FLG, W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.X_NON_BILLABLE_CODE_P, W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.X_NON_BILLABLE_CODE_R, W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.X_NON_BILLABLE_CODE_W, W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.X_NON_BILLABLE_CODE_C, W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.X_NON_BILLABLE_CODE_X, CAST(W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.X_NB_P_HOURS AS CHAR(22)), CAST(W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.X_NB_R_HOURS AS CHAR(22)), CAST(W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.X_NB_W_HOURS AS CHAR(22)), CAST(W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.X_NB_C_HOURS AS CHAR(22)), CAST(W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.X_NB_X_HOURS AS CHAR(22)) , W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.X_CONVERSION_TYPE_NAME, NVL(ASSIGN_PU.ROW_WID,0), CASE WHEN EXP_CLASS.XACT_CODE IN ('EXPENDITURE CLASS','Unspecified') THEN CASE WHEN EXP_CLASS.XACT_TYPE_CODE IN ('ST','OT') THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END ELSE NULL END ,W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.X_ORIG_TRANSACTION_REFERENCE ,W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.X_GL_TRANSFER_DATE ,W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.X_CORRECTION_DATE ,W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.X_EXPENDITURE_END_DATE
$$HINT2

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: User Defined Join
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: { W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS INNER JOIN W_PROJECT_D ON W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.PROJECT_ID = W_PROJECT_D.INTEGRATION_ID AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = W_PROJECT_D.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN PA_CAL ON W_PROJECT_D.PROJ_OPERATING_UNIT_ID = PA_CAL.ORG_ID AND W_PROJECT_D.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = PA_CAL.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID AND PA_CAL.CLASS = 'PROJECTS' LEFT OUTER JOIN GL_CAL ON W_PROJECT_D.LEDGER_ID = GL_CAL.LEDGER_ID AND W_PROJECT_D.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = GL_CAL.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID AND GL_CAL.CLASS = 'GL' INNER JOIN PROJ_OPER_UNIT ON W_PROJECT_D.PROJ_OPERATING_UNIT_ID = PROJ_OPER_UNIT.INTEGRATION_ID AND W_PROJECT_D.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = PROJ_OPER_UNIT.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.GL_ACCOUNTING_DT >= PROJ_OPER_UNIT.EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.GL_ACCOUNTING_DT < PROJ_OPER_UNIT.EFFECTIVE_TO_DT INNER JOIN OPERATING_UNIT ON W_PROJECT_D.OPERATING_UNIT_ORG_ID = OPERATING_UNIT.INTEGRATION_ID AND W_PROJECT_D.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = OPERATING_UNIT.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.GL_ACCOUNTING_DT >= OPERATING_UNIT.EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.GL_ACCOUNTING_DT < OPERATING_UNIT.EFFECTIVE_TO_DT LEFT OUTER JOIN EXPENDITURE_OPER_UNIT ON W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.EXPENDITURE_OPER_UNIT_ID = EXPENDITURE_OPER_UNIT.INTEGRATION_ID AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = EXPENDITURE_OPER_UNIT.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.GL_ACCOUNTING_DT >= EXPENDITURE_OPER_UNIT.EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.GL_ACCOUNTING_DT < EXPENDITURE_OPER_UNIT.EFFECTIVE_TO_DT LEFT OUTER JOIN EXPENDITURE_ORGANIZATION ON W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.EXPENDITURE_ORGANIZATION_ID = EXPENDITURE_ORGANIZATION.INTEGRATION_ID AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = EXPENDITURE_ORGANIZATION.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.GL_ACCOUNTING_DT >= EXPENDITURE_ORGANIZATION.EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.GL_ACCOUNTING_DT < EXPENDITURE_ORGANIZATION.EFFECTIVE_TO_DT LEFT OUTER JOIN RESOURCE_ORGANIZATION ON W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.RESOURCE_ORGANIZATION_ID = RESOURCE_ORGANIZATION.INTEGRATION_ID AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = RESOURCE_ORGANIZATION.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.GL_ACCOUNTING_DT >= RESOURCE_ORGANIZATION.EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.GL_ACCOUNTING_DT < RESOURCE_ORGANIZATION.EFFECTIVE_TO_DT LEFT OUTER JOIN INCURRED_BY_ORGANIZATION ON W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.INCURRED_BY_ORGANIZATION_ID = INCURRED_BY_ORGANIZATION.INTEGRATION_ID AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = INCURRED_BY_ORGANIZATION.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.GL_ACCOUNTING_DT >= INCURRED_BY_ORGANIZATION.EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.GL_ACCOUNTING_DT < INCURRED_BY_ORGANIZATION.EFFECTIVE_TO_DT LEFT OUTER JOIN ENTERED_BY_EMP ON W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.ENTERED_BY_EMP_ID = ENTERED_BY_EMP.INTEGRATION_ID AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = ENTERED_BY_EMP.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.GL_ACCOUNTING_DT >= ENTERED_BY_EMP.EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.GL_ACCOUNTING_DT < ENTERED_BY_EMP.EFFECTIVE_TO_DT LEFT OUTER JOIN INCURRED_BY_EMP ON W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.INCURRED_BY_EMP_ID = INCURRED_BY_EMP.INTEGRATION_ID AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = INCURRED_BY_EMP.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.GL_ACCOUNTING_DT >= INCURRED_BY_EMP.EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.GL_ACCOUNTING_DT < INCURRED_BY_EMP.EFFECTIVE_TO_DT LEFT OUTER JOIN W_USER_D ON W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.CHANGED_BY_ID = W_USER_D.INTEGRATION_ID AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = W_USER_D.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.GL_ACCOUNTING_DT >= W_USER_D.EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.GL_ACCOUNTING_DT < W_USER_D.EFFECTIVE_TO_DT LEFT OUTER JOIN USER_CREATED ON W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.CREATED_BY_ID = USER_CREATED.INTEGRATION_ID AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = USER_CREATED.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.GL_ACCOUNTING_DT >= USER_CREATED.EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.GL_ACCOUNTING_DT < USER_CREATED.EFFECTIVE_TO_DT LEFT OUTER JOIN BOM ON W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.MFG_RESOURCE_BOM_ID = BOM.INTEGRATION_ID AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = BOM.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN NL ON W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.MFG_RESOURCE_NL_ID = NL.INTEGRATION_ID AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = NL.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN W_FINANCIAL_RESOURCE_D ON W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.FINANCIAL_RESOURCE_ID = W_FINANCIAL_RESOURCE_D.INTEGRATION_ID AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = W_FINANCIAL_RESOURCE_D.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN PA_PERIOD ON W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.PROJ_ACCOUNTING_PERIOD_ID = PA_PERIOD.INTEGRATION_ID AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = PA_PERIOD.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN GL_PERIOD ON W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.GL_ACCOUNTING_PERIOD_ID = GL_PERIOD.INTEGRATION_ID AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = GL_PERIOD.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN W_PROJECT_ROLE_D ON W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.PROJ_ROLE_ID = W_PROJECT_ROLE_D.INTEGRATION_ID AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = W_PROJECT_ROLE_D.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN EXP_CLASS ON W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.EXPENDITURE_CLASS_ID = EXP_CLASS.INTEGRATION_ID AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = EXP_CLASS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN RESOURCE_CLASS ON W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.RESOURCE_CLASS_ID = RESOURCE_CLASS.INTEGRATION_ID AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = RESOURCE_CLASS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN W_WORK_TYPE_D ON W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.WORK_TYPE_ID = W_WORK_TYPE_D.INTEGRATION_ID AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = W_WORK_TYPE_D.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN W_STATUS_D ON W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.TRANSFER_STATUS_ID = W_STATUS_D.INTEGRATION_ID AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = W_STATUS_D.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN W_CODE_D ON W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.UOM = W_CODE_D.SOURCE_CODE AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = W_CODE_D.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID AND W_CODE_D.CATEGORY = 'UOM' AND W_CODE_D.LANGUAGE_CODE = '$$LANGUAGE_CODE' LEFT OUTER JOIN W_PRODUCT_D ON W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.PRODUCT_ID = W_PRODUCT_D.INTEGRATION_ID AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = W_PRODUCT_D.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.GL_ACCOUNTING_DT >= W_PRODUCT_D.EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.GL_ACCOUNTING_DT < W_PRODUCT_D.EFFECTIVE_TO_DT LEFT OUTER JOIN W_PARTY_ORG_D ON W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.VENDOR_ID = W_PARTY_ORG_D.SUPPLIER_ID AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = W_PARTY_ORG_D.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.GL_ACCOUNTING_DT >= W_PARTY_ORG_D.EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.GL_ACCOUNTING_DT < W_PARTY_ORG_D.EFFECTIVE_TO_DT AND W_PARTY_ORG_D.SUPPLIER_ID IS NOT NULL LEFT OUTER JOIN W_JOB_D ON W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.JOB_ID = W_JOB_D.INTEGRATION_ID AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = W_JOB_D.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.GL_ACCOUNTING_DT >= W_JOB_D.EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.GL_ACCOUNTING_DT < W_JOB_D.EFFECTIVE_TO_DT LEFT OUTER JOIN BILL_JOB ON W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.BILL_JOB_ID = BILL_JOB.INTEGRATION_ID AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = BILL_JOB.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.GL_ACCOUNTING_DT >= BILL_JOB.EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.GL_ACCOUNTING_DT < BILL_JOB.EFFECTIVE_TO_DT LEFT OUTER JOIN W_INVENTORY_PRODUCT_D ON W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID = W_INVENTORY_PRODUCT_D.INTEGRATION_ID AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = W_INVENTORY_PRODUCT_D.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.GL_ACCOUNTING_DT >= W_INVENTORY_PRODUCT_D.EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.GL_ACCOUNTING_DT < W_INVENTORY_PRODUCT_D.EFFECTIVE_TO_DT WHERE W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.X_DUP_RECORDS_FLG IS NULL } $$HINT2

TRANSFORMATION.DESCRIPTION: PC 4/20/16 - Adding the match LR2 conversion logic. Basically will convert to global1 (usd) based on PROJ_FUNC currency (which is in LOC_CURR_CODE) unless doc is already USD. Edit (7/14/16) - Added functional currency which will be used instead
TRANSFORMATION.NAME: EXPTRANS_FROM_CURCY_CD_SWITCH

TRANSFORMFIELD.DESCRIPTION: PC 4/20/16 - Adding the match LR2 conversion logic. Basically will convert to global1 (usd) based on PROJ_FUNC currency (which is in LOC_CURR_CODE) unless doc is already USD. Edit (7/14/16) - Added functional currency which will be used instead
TRANSFORMFIELD.NAME: OUTPUT_CURR_CODE

TRANSFORMFIELD.EXPRESSION: IIF(NOT ISNULL(X_PRDR_FUNC_BURDENED_COST),IIF(DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = 13,IIF(SUBSTR(X_GL_ACCOUNT_NUM,1,1) ='5' OR SUBSTR(X_GL_ACCOUNT_NUM,1,1)= '6' OR SUBSTR(X_GL_ACCOUNT_NUM,1,1)= '7' OR SUBSTR(X_GL_ACCOUNT_NUM,1,1)= '8' OR SUBSTR(X_GL_ACCOUNT_NUM,1,1)= '9' , X_PRDR_FUNC_BURDENED_COST * GLOBAL2_EXCHANGE_RATE , 0 ),X_PRDR_FUNC_BURDENED_COST * GLOBAL2_EXCHANGE_RATE),0)
TRANSFORMFIELD.NAME: X_IND_PRDR_GLBL2_BURDENED_COST

TRANSFORMFIELD.EXPRESSION: IIF(NOT ISNULL(X_PRDR_FUNC_BURDENED_COST),IIF(DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = 13,IIF(SUBSTR(X_GL_ACCOUNT_NUM,1,1) ='5' OR SUBSTR(X_GL_ACCOUNT_NUM,1,1)= '6' OR SUBSTR(X_GL_ACCOUNT_NUM,1,1)= '7' OR SUBSTR(X_GL_ACCOUNT_NUM,1,1)= '8' OR SUBSTR(X_GL_ACCOUNT_NUM,1,1)= '9' , X_PRDR_FUNC_BURDENED_COST * GLOBAL3_EXCHANGE_RATE , 0 ),X_PRDR_FUNC_BURDENED_COST * GLOBAL3_EXCHANGE_RATE ),0)
TRANSFORMFIELD.NAME: X_IND_PRDR_GLBL3_BURDENED_COST

TRANSFORMFIELD.EXPRESSION: iif( ((SUBSTR(X_GL_ACCOUNT_NUM,1,3) != '499' and SUBSTR(X_GL_ACCOUNT_NUM,1,3) != '399' and SUBSTR(X_GL_ACCOUNT_NUM,1,1) = '4' ) or isnull(X_GL_ACCOUNT_NUM)) and (X_SOURCE_TYPE = 'LABOR_COST' or X_SOURCE_TYPE = 'NON_LABOR_COST'), 'Y','N')
TRANSFORMFIELD.NAME: X_OPR_ALIGN_FLAG

ATTRIBUTE.VALUE:
DELETE from W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS FS WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM W_GL_ACCOUNT_D ACCT, WC_JEG_ECR_LE_LKP_TMP TMP WHERE ACCT.ACCOUNT_SEG1_CODE =TMP.LE_CODE AND TMP.ECR_FLAG ='Y' AND FS.COST_GL_ACCOUNT_ID=ACCT.INTEGRATION_ID AND FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = ACCT.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID AND ACCT.EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT <= FS.GL_ACCOUNTING_DT AND ACCT.EFFECTIVE_TO_DT > FS.GL_ACCOUNTING_DT AND TO_NUMBER(TO_CHAR(FS.GL_ACCOUNTING_DT,'YYYYMMDD')) > SUBSTR($$X_DIVESTCO_MON,5,8)); COMMIT;
UPDATE PROD_PA_BIDATA32.W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS SET X_DUP_RECORDS_FLG = 'Y' WHERE integration_id in ( SELECT integration_id FROM PROD_PA_BIDATA32.W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS GROUP BY integration_id HAVING COUNT(*) > 1); COMMIT;
